title: Surveillance of blastomycosis - Canada.ca
content:
## Surveillance of blastomycosis
Learn how blastomycosis is monitored.

## How many cases are there of blastomycosis in Canada?
The true incidence of blastomycosis is not known, as it is not reportable nationally in Canada. However, some provinces do report on the disease.
The annual incidence rate of blastomycosis is 0.62 cases per 100,000 people in the Canadian provinces of:
In areas of endemicity, the annual incidence of blastomycosis requiring hospitalization is 3 to 6 cases per million persons.
